name: GET /api/v1/health/live
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: wp54PV  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 403, 500, 204, 401, 422, 429, 503  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/live  2. Test Case ID: S0BKIS  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"authorization error","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/live
